source_old_req: The ADIRU system shall operate under legal operating scenario assumptions for all external interactions at the system boundary. The system shall enforce end-to-end directional and type consistency for all connections between subcomponents. For each process subcomponent (acc_pr, acc_hm_pr, ADIRUp_pr, SHM_pr), the system shall guarantee that internal state transitions and externally observable behaviors are traceable through contract assertions that relate system inputs, internal states, and outputs. The system shall maintain type consistency for all data flows, including accelerometer data inputs (acc1_input through acc6_input) and health monitoring signals (v_acc1_dataout through v_acc6_dataout), and shall ensure that error conditions propagate correctly through the system via the error output ports (acc_error_out, ADIRUp_error_out) and corresponding alarm input ports (arlarm_acc_in, arlarm_adirup_in). The system shall ensure that all connections maintain proper directional flow and type compatibility as defined in the system implementation ADIRU.impl.
natural_requirement: The ADIRU component shall define the implementation-level data routing and execution constraints for ADIRU.impl. In the implementation layer, ADIRU.impl shall route signal flow from acc_pr.acc1_output to acc_hm_pr.acc1_input through C1 and signal flow from acc_pr.acc2_output to acc_hm_pr.acc2_input through C2. The deployment mapping shall bind acc_pr to processor main_cpu.part1, bind acc_hm_pr to processor main_cpu.part2, bind ADIRUp_pr to processor main_cpu.part3, and bind SHM_pr to processor main_cpu.part4.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc_pr.acc1_output to acc_hm_pr.acc1_input through connection C1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from acc_pr.acc1_output to acc_hm_pr.acc1_input.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc_pr.acc2_output to acc_hm_pr.acc2_input through connection C2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc_pr.acc2_output to acc_hm_pr.acc2_input.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind acc_pr to processor main_cpu.part1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part1)) applies to acc_pr.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind acc_hm_pr to processor main_cpu.part2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part2)) applies to acc_hm_pr.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind ADIRUp_pr to processor main_cpu.part3.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part3)) applies to ADIRUp_pr.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind SHM_pr to processor main_cpu.part4.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part4)) applies to SHM_pr.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from acc_pr.acc1_output to acc_hm_pr.acc1_input. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc_pr.acc2_output to acc_hm_pr.acc2_input. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part1)) applies to acc_pr. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part2)) applies to acc_hm_pr. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part3)) applies to ADIRUp_pr. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference (main_cpu.part4)) applies to SHM_pr.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The ADIRU.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc_pr.acc1_output to acc_hm_pr.acc1_input through connection C1. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc_pr.acc2_output to acc_hm_pr.acc2_input through connection C2. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind acc_pr to processor main_cpu.part1. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind acc_hm_pr to processor main_cpu.part2. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind ADIRUp_pr to processor main_cpu.part3. The ADIRU.impl implementation shall bind SHM_pr to processor main_cpu.part4.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
